entity.label: Melea
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Fulness, the son of Menan and father of Eliakim, in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:31).

nodes.label: Melea
nodes.description: Fulness, the son of Menan and father of Eliakim, in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:31).

nodes.label: Eliakim
nodes.description: The son of Melea (Luke 3:30), and probably grandson of Nathan.

verses.text: Which was the son of Melea, which was the son of Menan, which was the son of Mattatha, which was the son of Nathan, which was the son of David,
